en.extract:
The red-tailed shrike or Turkestan shrike (Lanius phoenicuroides) is a member of the shrike family (Laniidae). It was formerly considered conspecific with the isabelline shrike and the red-backed shrike.


Description
The plumage is a sandy colour. It has a red tail.


Range
The red-tailed shrike breeds in south Siberia and Central Asia.


Habits
This migratory medium-sized passerine eats large insects, small birds, rodents and lizards. Like other shrikes it hunts from prominent perches, and impales corpses on thorns or barbed wire as a larder. It breeds in open cultivated country, preferably with thorn bushes.


Gallery


References


External links
Oiseaux Pictures

The '''red-tailed shrike''' or '''Turkestan shrike'''<ref>Message, Stephen (2001) "The Turkestan Shrike in Kent" ''[[Birding World]]'' '''14'''(10):432–434</ref> ('''''Lanius phoenicuroides''''') is a member of the [[shrike]] family ([[Laniidae]]). It was formerly considered conspecific with the [[isabelline shrike]] and the [[red-backed shrike]].

==Description==
The plumage is a sandy colour. It has a red tail.<ref>.Worfolk, Tim (2000) "Identification of red-backed, isabelline and brown shrikes" ''[[Dutch Birding]]'' '''22''' (6): 323–362</ref>

==Range==
The red-tailed shrike breeds in south [[Siberia]] and [[Central Asia]].

==Habits==
This [[bird migration|migratory]] medium-sized [[passerine]] eats large insects, small birds, rodents and lizards. Like other shrikes it hunts from prominent perches, and impales corpses on thorns or barbed wire as a larder. It breeds in open cultivated country, preferably with thorn bushes.

zh.extract:
棕尾伯劳（台湾作棕紅尾伯勞）（学名：Lanius phoenicuroides），是雀形目伯劳科的一种鸟类。


特征
棕尾伯劳体重约28克，翼长约90.8毫米，嘴峰长约18.2毫米，喙宽度约5.6毫米，喙厚度约7.1毫米，跗蹠长约24.4毫米，尾长约77.2毫米。棕尾伯劳是候鸟，其栖息在半开放的灌木丛中，食性为肉食性，主要食物来源是陆生无脊椎动物。


分布
伊朗至巴基斯坦、哈萨克斯坦南部和中国最西部（新疆西部）。
